Virtual Reality Lessons


Ms Tina

Tina brings the newest technology from the United States, San Francisco 
Bay Area, region of the Silicon Valley, with her virtual reality classrooms. Holding a bachelor’s degree in architecture design from the American Ivy League Cornell University In New York, Tina combines over 20-years of expertise in communications, the service industry and now education, to create and teach in these fully immersive, engaging and interactive VR environments. Tina is certified by the prestigious University of California Los Angeles (UCLA Extension) TESOL Program and offers her wealth of experiences living and working in the US, Europe and Asia to help learners from anywhere in the world to learn English as a second language.

Why Choose Us

Remote learning that’s in-person and social with a welcoming and friendly community worldwide, without ANY health risks.

Fully Immersive and interactive classroom environments from realistic recreations to the fantastic imaginary – “virtually” unlimited!

Qualified and experienced instructors teaching in-person live and in real time from around the world 24/7 with high quality teaching materials.

Testimonials 

“I would love to explore more of your VR classrooms, especially since I hope to collaborate with a nonprofit my friend works for in Brussels to create online global education exchanges between American and European students. I think what you are doing is so essential for learning because regardless of whether a class is online or in person, the learning environment has to be engaging!“

“Wow, you are really talented! This is a brilliant and unique idea! Your lesson has awesome visual supports and I like how I like how your students respond to the environments”

“Your classrooms are so amazing! I’ve never seen this type of lesson in any of the four courses of UCLA TESOL classes I took! How original and unique. It’s great you utilize the VR platform for education. These classes must be very entertaining for the students, which means they will enjoy the lessons better and stay engaged. Thats huge especially when you target younger learners, because their attention span is usually shorter than adults.

“Making learning enjoyable is important for students to get motivated and continue their education.  Your VR classrooms are so unique and interesting!”

“Your videos are fascinating. Teaching virtually comes with its own set of challenges especially during a pandemic, these environments built with 3-D models are amazing. These classrooms will be awesome for your future students. It definitely, increases attention from the students because it is easier to comprehend and captures more attention than text or static images.“

“I was real impressed by the high quality of your VR classroom and the bilingual blond teacher speaking both Mandarin and English! You are clearly devoted to education. Keep up your good work!”
